comment: Typechecking is driven by scripts/typecheck.ts, which copies the generated *.osts artifacts into a temp .build/ dir as .ts files (with the gen scripts) and runs tsc over THIS config. The ExcelScript host surface is provided by the `declare namespace ExcelScript` block embedded in the shippable/conformance scripts, so NO node libs are needed for the bundle itself. `scripts/` keeps `node` types because the generator is a real tsx tool.
